easy: Tell me about yourself and your background.
What motivated you to apply for this role?
Walk me through your professional journey so far.

hard: Tell me about yourself and how your unique combination of experiences prepares you for the challenges of this role.

Describe your career journey and how each experience has shaped your professional philosophy.
